subcodes.first_line: This is a leaf We have sent unto thee; verily, it singeth within its own self at all times that there is none other God but Him, the All-Compelling [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذه ورقه ارسلناها الیک انها فی کل حین تغن فی نفسها بانه لا اله الا هو المهیمن
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @predictions and prophecies, @spiritual transformation
